reviews.review_title: - An absolute banger of a roguelike
reviews.review_description:
This game is so much fun! It’s a classic roguelite zombie survival game, and it’s super addictive.
 
You get crystals for killing zombies to upgrade, and you can choose your own rewards each time. You also earn coins after each level to power up your abilities—great sense of progression.
 
The biggest surprise is the mixed reality tabletop mode. It’s incredibly immersive, and controlling survivors to escape feels awesome.
 
Plus, no 3D motion sickness at all, so it’s comfortable even after long play sessions.
 
If you love survival, roguelite, or VR games, you should definitely give it a go!

Actually like the game it's very cool as a concept and it's a good idea,and unique. but since you don't update the game or even talk to us nor even share a discord . It seems like you don't find your own game to be important so because you lack passion I have to give you a 3.  Mixed reality mode is unfinished and needs fixing but u guys won't care until some says something smh

This is without a doubt one of the best zombie VR games I have ever played. From the moment I put on my headset, I was completely immersed in a terrifying and thrilling post-apocalyptic world. The graphics are sharp, the sound design is incredible, and every zombie encounter feels intense and realistic.
 
The controls are smooth and intuitive, making shooting, reloading, and melee combat feel natural and satisfying. The level design is varied, with plenty of tight spaces, open areas, and dark corners that keep you on edge at all times. The horde mechanics are well-balanced—challenging but never unfair, which makes every victory feel earned.
 
What really stands out is how well this game captures the true feeling of survival in VR. You’ll find yourself ducking, aiming, and reacting to every sound just like you would in real life. The progression system, weapons, and upgrades add tons of replay value, and I keep coming back for more.
 
If you’re a fan of VR, zombies, or action-packed survival games, Zombie Survivor 2 is a must-play. It’s polished, fun, intense, and absolutely worth every penny. Easily a 5-star experience!

Review: Zombie Survivors 2
 
Zombie Survivors 2 is a tightly crafted Roguelite survival game that nails the core loop of outrunning the undead, rescuing allies, and building a resilient survivor team—all while introducing a standout mixed-reality desktop mode that elevates its accessibility.
 
The game’s biggest strength lies in its hybrid playstyle and comfort focus. The mixed-reality desktop mode delivers immersive, intuitive control over survivor escapes, and crucially, avoids the 3D motion sickness that plagues many similar titles—making it easy to dive into intense chases without fatigue.
 
Gameplay is classic Roguelite with satisfying progression. Slaying zombies drops crystals for instant level-ups, and the freedom to pick any bonus each time lets you tailor builds to your playstyle, whether you prioritize firepower, speed, or team support. Post-level coins add meaningful long-term growth, letting you boost combat capabilities and refine your strategy across runs, keeping each playthrough fresh and rewarding.
 
If you crave fast-paced, customizable zombie survival with a smart accessibility twist, Zombie Survivors 2 is a solid pick. It distills the genre’s thrills into a polished, approachable package that’s easy to enjoy in short bursts or longer sessions alike.

"A must-play VR gem with an innovative tabletop twist！"
This VR zombie survival game is incredibly addictive. It blends roguelite elements perfectly—you slay zombies to collect crystals, then choose your own upgrade path each time. After finishing a level, you earn coins to permanently boost your survivors' abilities, which makes every run feel rewarding.

The standout feature is definitely the mixed reality tabletop mode. It lets you view and control the survivors on your actual desk as if they're miniature figures in a real-world escape scene. The immersion is next-level, and best of all, I experienced zero motion sickness, even after playing for hours.

If you're looking for a fresh VR experience that combines strategy, action, and comfort, this game is an easy recommendation. 10/10 would survive again！

reviews.review_title: A Unique and Immersive Zombie Experience
reviews.review_description: A very creative zombie survival game! The mixed reality tabletop mode feels immersive while avoiding 3D motion sickness. Defeating zombies to upgrade and rescuing survivors to build a team makes the gameplay addictive, with new strategies and fun in every run. Definitely worth trying!
